text: Good morning everyone - Q4 benchmarking kickoff deck is in the shared drive. Please review before Tuesday's standup.
Thanks Tom - I'll have Section 2 (competitive benchmarks) drafted by end of day Thursday.
Confirmed, looking over it now. Will flag any data gaps before EOD.
:wave: Standup: Yesterday - finished pulling GA4 export for Oct. Today - cleaning the dataset, starting benchmark tables. Blockers - none.
Looks good Andrea. Client wants a first draft by Nov 14 if possible - can you hit that?
Standup: Yesterday - reviewed data sources from client portal. Today - building the Looker view for channel attribution. Blockers - waiting on Marcus for campaign spend data.
Priya - I sent you the Q3 campaign spend CSV from Marcus. Should be in the shared drive under /Q4-benchmarking/inputs.
Got it, thank you! Starting the attribution model now.
Hey team - we have a prospective client asking about our social analytics capabilities. Andrea, any chance you could pull a sample benchmark slide we've used before?
Sure Marcus - I have one from the Hartfield account. I'll anonymize it and drop it in the marketing shared folder by noon.
Perfect, you're a lifesaver :raised_hands:
Reminder: the Q3 campaign performance summary is posted in the shared drive. Happy to walk through key findings at next week's marketing sync.
Anyone else been to Northstar Cafe on High St? Highly recommend the kale caesar for the lunch crowd.
Yes!! The grain bowls are amazing too. We should do a team lunch there before the Nov crunch.
I'm in for that. Beats sad desk lunch.
Columbus Marathon is this weekend for anyone interested in watching the route near German Village. Should be great weather.
Oh nice! I'll be out on my morning run anyway, might catch the tail end on Alum Creek.
Quick check-in on Q4 deliverable. Andrea - how are we tracking against the Nov 20 deadline?
On track. Sections 1-3 drafted. Section 4 (competitive landscape) needs one more data pull - should wrap that Thursday. Plan is to have a full draft to you by Nov 14, final polish by Nov 18.
Attribution model is 80% done - I'll have the chart exports ready by Wed so Andrea can drop them into Section 3.
